title: Best Restaurants in Chanthaburi Thailand (2026)
meta_description: Where to eat in Chanthaburi for 2026: local river-city restaurants, Nam Pu market, old-town sweets, and the food stops that make the province feel specific.
intro: Chanthaburi food is strongest when you treat it as part of the city's river-and-old-town identity, not as a generic Thai restaurant list. A good food day here usually mixes one established local restaurant, one lighter river stop, and some market or sweet-shop grazing in the old quarter. These are the Chanthaburi eating stops most worth planning around.

items.name: Krua Maneechan
items.description: A dependable polished stop for Chanthaburi local dishes, seafood, and Eastern Thai flavors in a setting that still feels tied to the province.
items.current_info: Best when you want a fuller local-food overview rather than a single-dish stop.

items.name: Chanthorn Phochana
items.description: One of the city's best-known classic names and a useful way to keep a Chanthaburi trip centered on local restaurant culture rather than on chain-friendly fallback choices.
items.current_info: A good dinner anchor if you want a more classic Chanthaburi meal.

items.name: Tamajun Restaurant
items.description: A useful river-adjacent restaurant if you want the old-town atmosphere to carry into dinner and not stop at the sightseeing stage.
items.current_info: Works especially well after a cathedral and waterfront afternoon.

items.name: Koff House Coffee Bar & Eatery
items.description: A practical riverside cafe-and-meal stop for travelers who want a more casual pause without leaving the river quarter.
items.current_info: Best for daytime coffee, a lighter meal, or a slower break during the heritage walk.

items.name: Nam Pu Market
items.description: A better food-context stop than many restaurant lists because it ties directly into the old town's daily rhythm and traditional products.
highlights: Best market-food stop in the old quarter
items.current_info: Treat it as a market-grazing stop rather than a sit-down meal destination.

items.name: Old-town native sweet shops
items.description: One of the easiest ways to make Chanthaburi feel specific through food rather than just photogenic through architecture.
items.current_info: Buy small portions from several places instead of turning one shop into the whole experience.
